title: Disney Devastating Discrimination Complaint - This is VERY Bad
description:
#OMGTC #DismalDisney #CultureCasino

Disney's Devastating Discrimination Complaint. This is VERY Bad indeed. Shocking details behind a FEDERAL Discrimination Complaint adding to their recent legal troubles in the last few weeks alone. Current allegations of discrimination against white men, sexual identity, and Religious views ,add to the mounting legal implications of Disney's diversity, equity, and inclusion policies that are oriented around immutable. The entertainment giant itself has been revealing the evidence in documents both publicly available and leaked. The arguments presented by America First Legal are clear and concise. Don't miss this critical examination of corporate practices and their impact on society.
